summary: Quotes are fetched via a server-side component in `app/page.tsx` which renders the `Quotes` component. The data is retrieved from the database using Prisma through `lib/utils/query.ts` and displayed using the `Quote` component which is wrapped in a `QuoteWrapper` for styling.

nodes.title: Page Entry
nodes.explanation: The main page component renders the Quotes component inside a Suspense boundary.

nodes.title: Quotes Component
nodes.explanation: The Quotes component manages the display of individual Quote components.

nodes.title: Data Fetching Logic
nodes.explanation: Internal utility used to perform queries, likely interacting with the database via Prisma.

nodes.title: Database Access
nodes.explanation: Provides the Prisma client instance to interact with the database schema.

nodes.title: Quote Display
nodes.explanation: Receives QuoteResult data and renders the quote text, ID, and timestamp.

nodes.title: UI Wrapper
nodes.explanation: A presentation component that wraps quotes with a styled container and cache metadata.
